VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: This is a real GitHub-hosted software reference with the official BibTeX entry listing the title as "Stanford Alpaca: An Instruction-following LLaMA model" and authors Rohan Taori, Ishaan Gulrajani, Tianyi Zhang, Yann Dubois, Xuechen Li, Carlos Guestrin, Percy Liang, and Tatsunori B. Hashimoto — exactly matching the cited reference. The automated checker flagged mismatches because GitHub repositories use a repo name as "title" and "tatsu-lab" as "author," but the real citation metadata from the repo itself confirms both the title and authors.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/stanford_alpaca
